hero.name: Enzo Norese
hero.title: Backend Developer & Cloud Architect
hero.description: I design and implement backend architectures on Microsoft Azure, integrating cloud services and artificial intelligence to solve real business problems. Technical lead with experience in recruitment systems, ERP migration, and AI model integration.

about.subtitle: A little bit about who I am
about.bio_1: Computer Engineer with a background in electronics, specialized in backend development and cloud solutions architecture. At TeamWork Capacitación Ltda. in Santiago, I operate as technical lead and solutions architect — designing and building high-impact systems that power real operations.
about.bio_2: I lead two key initiatives: the Softland → Rex+ ERP migration (completed with zero data loss and zero downtime) and the Digital 24/7 Recruiter — an AI-powered mass recruitment agent on Azure serverless, with a cascaded multi-model pipeline (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) designed to process tens of thousands of applications during peak demand periods like Cyber Day.
about.bio_3: My engineering philosophy — "Augmented Engineering" — positions AI tools as technical capability multipliers, not replacements for sound engineering judgment. My path from electronics technician to cloud architect gives me a broad perspective that spans from hardware diagnostics to modern distributed systems.

jobs.description: Technical lead and solutions architect, responsible for architecture decisions, team standards, and cloud service integration. Leading the ERP Softland → Rex+ migration, managing component analysis, cross-system schema mapping, and data integrity validation. Designing and implementing serverless architectures on Azure Functions v4, integrating services such as Service Bus, SignalR, Blob Storage, CosmosDB, and PostgreSQL.

Maintained, debugged, and developed new features for integration APIs built with C# (.NET Core 3.1) and JavaScript (Node.js). Also responsible for maintaining continuous integration and deployment workflows.
Responsible for repairing and maintaining a wide variety of electronic equipment, with specialization in digital cameras and printers.

skills.subtitle: Technologies I work with and milestones I'm proud of

stories.label: AI Models Integrated
stories.description: Integrated and orchestrated language models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) in a process automation system, evaluating accuracy and cost per model.

stories.label: Years as Tech Lead
stories.description: Acted as de facto technical lead and solutions architect, driving architecture decisions and team standards without a formal title.

stories.label: Azure Services in Production
stories.description: Designed and implemented architectures combining Azure Functions, Service Bus, SignalR, Blob Storage, and CosmosDB in real production systems.

stories.label: Years in Tech
stories.description: From electronics technician to cloud architect — a journey spanning hardware diagnostics, C#/.NET, and modern distributed systems on Azure.

projects.subtitle: A selection of things I've built

items.title: Relational Model
items.description: Figma-like tool exclusively for visual documentation of relational database models. Allows designing schemas, defining relationships, and exporting structured documentation.

items.title: EuforIA
items.description: AI chat interface that integrates multiple language models (Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini) in a single platform. Allows switching between models and comparing responses in real time.

items.title: Auth System
items.description: Complete authentication and authorization system with OAuth 2.0, OIDC, refresh token management, session revocation, and Redis-based blacklist. Designed as a reusable module for Azure architectures.

items.title: Azure Path
items.description: Interactive study app for Microsoft Azure certification preparation. Organizes content by modules, includes practice questions, and tracks progress.

items.title: Azure SignalR Real-time PoC
items.description: Proof of concept for scalable real-time messaging using Azure SignalR Service with Azure Functions. Demonstrates event-driven WebSocket communication patterns for distributed applications.

items.title: TypeScript Backend Libraries
items.description: Collection of utility libraries for Node.js: timezone adjustment in Azure serverless functions, Chilean RUT and phone validation/formatting, and a PostgreSQL query builder with injection vulnerability protection.

contact.subtitle: Let's work together
contact.description: Do you have a project, an opportunity, or just want to talk tech? Write to me directly — I respond.
